summary: Tested complete lifecycle management for Seasons, Leagues, and Tournaments. All backend APIs (10/10 tests passed, 1 skipped). Admin UI verified with Playwright - all lifecycle controls working correctly including season status badges, league status column, matchday range constraints, and 'Completa Stagione' button.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 1 skipped - no completed leagues to test)

seed_data_creation: Created test leagues during testing (Test League Valid G26) - can be deleted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lifecycle management fully implemented. Season 2025-2026 is active. G1-G25 COMPLETED, G26 DRAFT. Matchday range constraint working (first_selectable=26, last_matchday=26). All 61+ leagues have status='active'.

backend_api_tests.GET_admin_seasons_status_field: PASS - seasons return status field, active season has status='active'
backend_api_tests.POST_admin_seasons_archive_active_fails: PASS - returns 400 with message about completed requirement
backend_api_tests.GET_rbac_leagues_status_field: PASS - all leagues have status field (active/draft/completed/cancelled)
backend_api_tests.POST_admin_leagues_complete_endpoint: PASS - endpoint exists, returns 404 for non-existent league

admin_ui_tests.login_page: PASS - Login with Email/Password and 'Accedi' button
